name: Shizulu Public Store
description: Community-visible shizules reviewed through the Shizulu GitHub repository.

items.name: Device Diagnostics Toolkit
items.description: Read-only device, storage, battery, and package diagnostics for checking shell capabilities.
items.author: Shizulu

items.name: Animation Tuner
items.description: Off, fast, normal, and relaxed animation presets using shell-accessible settings.
items.author: Shizulu

items.name: Display Comfort Pack
items.description: Calmer display settings and a restore action for supported Android builds.
items.author: Shizulu

items.name: Battery Sanity Tools
items.description: Battery saver toggles and battery status checks using Android shell commands.
items.author: Shizulu

items.name: Notification Quiet Kit
items.description: Toggles notification dots and heads-up notification settings where supported.
items.author: Shizulu

items.name: Private DNS Switchboard
items.description: Switches Android Private DNS between automatic, off, Cloudflare, Google, and Quad9 presets.
items.author: Shizulu

items.name: App Standby Manager
items.description: Moves a selected app between Android standby buckets to tune background behavior.
items.author: Shizulu

items.name: AppOps Privacy Kit
items.description: Inspects and adjusts selected app AppOps for background activity, wake locks, and notifications.
items.author: Shizulu

items.name: Permission Grant Helper
items.description: Attempts useful ADB-grantable permissions for a selected app when the app declares them.
items.author: Shizulu

items.name: Overlay Inspector
items.description: Lists runtime resource overlays and can enable or disable a typed overlay package/id.
items.author: Shizulu

items.name: Light Debloat Manager
items.description: Conservative user-0 disable/restore actions for common optional apps.
items.author: Shizulu

items.name: Shizulu Capability Booster
items.description: Attempts legitimate ADB-level grants and app-ops for Shizulu, with restore support.
items.author: Shizulu

items.name: Background Lockdown
items.description: Aggressively restricts a selected app's background behavior through AppOps and standby controls.
items.author: Shizulu

items.name: Package Disabler
items.description: Disables or re-enables a selected package for user 0. Can break apps or parts of the system UI.
items.author: Shizulu

items.name: App Data Reset Toolkit
items.description: Force-stops or clears all data for a selected app. Clear Data is destructive and cannot be undone.
items.author: Shizulu

items.name: Display Density Lab
items.description: Changes Android display density presets with a reset action. Bad values can make the UI hard to use.
items.author: Shizulu
